close_reason: Wired up backoff_fn through Consumer → Manager → Store.requeue. backoff_fn is now used for retry delays while snooze still uses explicit base_delay.
description:
Config.backoff_fn (config.ex line 15, 28) is defined but never used. Store.requeue/3 (line 460) hardcodes exponential backoff instead of using the configured function.

Fix: Pass backoff_fn through to Store.requeue and use it for delay calculation.
title: Wire up Config.backoff_fn in Store.requeue
